Institutional support

Adult diapers and supplies for care homes in Panama

Organise sizes, quantities, frequency and complementary supplies in one clear institutional request.

Request an institutional quoteTalk on WhatsApp
  • Personal guidance
  • Confirmed quotation
  • Support in Panama

Purchases with more variables

Information that helps prepare an institutional quote

01

Multiple sizes and formats

List approximate quantities by size or diaper type.

02

Monthly usage

Share historical use or an estimate per patient.

03

Complementary supplies

Consolidate underpads, gloves, wipes and other items.

04

Frequency

Indicate one-time, fortnightly, monthly or another schedule.

05

Delivery area

Allows logistics to be reviewed before confirmation.

06

Responsible contact

Centralises review with the person responsible for purchasing or care.

Clear coordination

From request to confirmation

  1. 1

    Add facility details

    Include patients, sizes, usage and products.

  2. 2

    Personal review

    The team checks missing information and products that may be quoted.

  3. 3

    Delivery coordination

    Quantities, availability, conditions and area are confirmed before the order.

Institutional form

Prepare your WhatsApp request

Step 1 of 3

  1. Facility details
  2. Usage and products
  3. Frequency and summary
Facility details

Usage and products

Products required
Frequency and summary

Review your summary

You can go back and edit any answer before opening WhatsApp.


    

  

    

  
FAQ
Frequently asked questions
Can you quote multiple sizes?
Yes. The form includes a field for sizes used and comments about quantities or distribution.
Is there a minimum volume order?
The website does not state a minimum. The team confirms any applicable conditions based on the request and availability.
Tell us what you need
We can help organise a one-time purchase, institutional quotation or flexible monthly plan.
Talk on WhatsApp
